title: Section 2A
content: 1[2A. [Construction of references to any law not in force or any functionary not existence in the State of Jammu and Kashmir*].--Omitted by the Jammu and Kashmir Reorganization (Adaptation of Central Laws) Order, 2020, vide notification No. S.O. 1123(E) dated (18-3-2020) and Vide Union Territory of Ladakh Reorganisation (Adaptation of Central Laws) Order, 2020, notification No. S.O. 3774(E), dated (23-10-2020). ]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 32 of 1973, s. 3 (w.e.f. 21-8-1973). *. Vide notification No. S.O. 3912(E), dated 30th October, 2019, this Act is made applicable to the Union territory of Jammu and Kashmir and the Union territory of Ladakh.
